changelog:
Improve Claude agent reliability: honor enabled/adaptive thinking settings, cap fake-reasoning budgets with final-response headroom, buffer tool streams, retry reasoning-only or malformed responses, and add API-key/output diagnostics to request logs.
提升 Claude Agent 稳定性：正确映射 enabled/adaptive 思考配置，限制思考预算并保留最终响应空间，缓冲工具流，对仅思考或残缺响应自动重试，并在请求日志中增加 API Key 与输出诊断。
